org.arakhne.neteditor.io.gxl

Interface GXLConstants

  • All Superinterfaces:
    XMLConstants
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractGXLReader, GXLReader, GXLReader1, GXLReader2, GXLWriter

    public interface GXLConstants
extends XMLConstants
    Constants for the GXL tools.

    GXL (Graph eXchange Language) is designed to be a standard exchange format for graphs. GXL is an XML sublanguage and the syntax is given by a XML DTD (Document Type Definition). This exchange format offers an adaptable and flexible means to support interoperability between graph-based tools.

    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    See Also:
    "http://www.gupro.de/GXL/I"
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io
